name_cn:
MCM Liz Visetos
Mini#Double-Sided Shopping Bag Tote👜
💰
·Cp Exclusive®️ Classic Cognac
MCM's classic minimalism is presented through a modern minimalist design. This mini shopping bag features a scaled-down version of the iconic Liz shopping bag style while retaining its beloved functionality. The inclusion of a matching clutch and double-sided cotton canvas fabric makes this small carryall even more charming.
Model No.: MWPDSLRO1CO001
Size: 28*11.5*20cm
Handle: Drop 18cm
Features: Double-sided use/Clutch included
Color: Cognac/Brown🏾
